title: gRPC-Web & Transcoding
description: Analyze the necessity of gRPC-Web for browser-side communication with gRPC backends. Explain how proxy-based transcoding (e.g., Envoy) bridges the gap between HTTP/1.1+ and gRPC. Implement gRPC-Web clients to interact with gRPC services from web browsers.
objectives: Analyze the necessity of gRPC-Web for browser-side communication with gRPC backends.
Explain how proxy-based transcoding (e.g., Envoy) bridges the gap between HTTP/1.1+ and gRPC.
Implement gRPC-Web clients to interact with gRPC services from web browsers.
